commands.repair_reason: Queue a focused repair on the PR branch because the remaining blockers are concrete code/test/changelog changes.; Needs attention: The PR narrows owner restore permissions but still leaves a concrete provenance-wipe bypass for owner-merged hidden skills.; Review finding: [P2] Block re-delete of owner-merged skills — convex/skills.ts:8174-8175 - [P3] Add the required changelog entry — convex/skills.ts:8139-8140 (sha=e86b2656ee94d0b3d6bd53dcaf38b86ab13fa31b)
commands.review_summary:
The PR tightens Convex skill soft-delete/undelete authorization, formats v1 HTTP authz errors, records audit actor-role metadata, adjusts VT hide provenance, removes an unused slug-validator export, and adds undelete-gate regression tests.

Reproducibility: yes. Source inspection gives a high-confidence path on PR head: an `owner.merged` row has `hiddenBy` set to the owner, owner delete clears `moderationReason`, and the next owner undelete passes.
